focus: Atlanta couples events: live music, art festivals, vegetarian food, comedy, dancing — May 9-10 2026
notes: Weekly update. Key highlights this weekend: Chastain Park Spring Arts Festival (Sat-Sun, free, 200+ vendors), comedy at Laughing Skull Lounge Sat 8PM and Helium Comedy Club with Rickey Smiley, Kevin Ross at Center Stage Sat 8PM, JILUKA at Masquerade Sat night. Vegetarian dining: La Semilla (Latin fusion, Memorial Dr), PLANTA (plant-based, Krog Street Market), Life Bistro. Live music: Moe. at The Eastern, JILUKA at Masquerade, Kevin Ross at Center Stage. All events curated for couples.
